description: Style NoteComfy enough for everyday play but cute enough to wear to her best friend's birthday party, choose this frock from doodle if you're looking for a versatile dress which girls will love.Product DetailsPrinted dress, has a round neckline, half buttoned placket at the back, short sleeves, bow and floral detail with beads on the left shoulder in front, a printed layer stitched on from the bust area and stitched at the waist, sash that can be tied at the back on the waist and  sparkling tulle detail at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse cool iron
